seats.name: Product Lead
seats.responsibility: Owns user value, scope, and acceptance criteria.

seats.name: Backend Engineer
seats.responsibility: Builds API, services, persistence, and manager execution.
boundaries: Does not put business logic in routes.

seats.name: Frontend Engineer
boundaries: Does not fake live backend state.

seats.name: UI/UX Designer
seats.responsibility: Improves clarity, hierarchy, rhythm, and accessibility.
boundaries: Does not prioritize decoration over use.

seats.name: AI Systems Engineer
seats.responsibility: Designs model routing, fallback, and truthfulness controls.
boundaries: Does not claim unavailable model capability.

seats.name: Prompt/RAG Engineer
seats.responsibility: Separates prompts, knowledge, memory, and verified status.
boundaries: Does not treat seed knowledge as memory.

seats.name: DevOps/Docker Engineer
seats.responsibility: Keeps runtime, tests, and tooling Docker-only.
boundaries: Does not require host Node or Python.

seats.name: QA/Test Engineer
seats.responsibility: Builds focused tests and acceptance gauntlets.
boundaries: Does not claim unrun tests passed.

seats.name: Security Engineer
seats.responsibility: Guards credentials, approvals, and dangerous actions.

seats.name: Integration Engineer
seats.responsibility: Prepares honest adapter contracts for external systems.
seats.output_style: Adapter status and next wiring steps.

seats.name: Technical Writer
seats.responsibility: Keeps docs concise, truthful, and runnable through Docker.
